styleGuide.description: PayeTax blog images - consistent isometric fintech style

background.style: Subtle gradient from base to category accent color at 10-20% opacity

styleGuide.illustrationStyle: 3D isometric, clean geometric shapes, soft glows and gradients
styleGuide.lighting: Soft ambient with subtle rim lighting, tech/futuristic feel
styleGuide.notes: DO NOT include any text, titles, or labels - the website overlays these

posts.visualConcept: Person standing confused in center of an isometric maze/labyrinth. A glowing percentage sign (60%) floats ominously above. Purple and cyan gradients. Trap door or pitfall visible in the maze.

Isometric view of £100k represented as stacked coins/money splitting into three different pathways (funnels). One path leads to a person, one to a building (company), one dissolves (tax). Amber/gold tones.

Isometric salary breakdown - large pile of coins gradually reducing through visible 'slices' being taken away. Final smaller pile reaches a person figure. Amber warm tones with subtle warning red hints.
Isometric paycheque or pay slip floating with coins flowing from it into organized stacks. Clean, professional feel. Amber/gold gradient accents.
Isometric calculator or phone showing numbers, surrounded by floating pound coins arranged in neat groups. Warm amber lighting.
Isometric piggy bank being filled with coins, some coins diverted to a tax box. Balanced composition showing savings vs tax. Amber tones.
Isometric wallet or purse open showing organized compartments of coins and notes. Clean midpoint salary visual. Amber/gold accents.
Isometric budget pie chart made of 3D segments - housing, bills, savings, spending - with small figure looking at it. Warm amber tones.
Isometric ascending stairs/levels with pound signs at different heights representing tax bands. Person climbing the stairs. Green emerald glow.
Isometric decoder machine or cipher wheel with letters and numbers (like 1257L) floating around it. Magnifying glass examining the code. Green emerald accents.
Isometric flowchart or system diagram showing money flowing through connected nodes (income → tax → services). Clean instructional feel. Emerald green paths.
Isometric open book or guide with simple icons floating above it - pound sign, percentage, calendar. Welcoming, educational feel. Soft emerald green glow.
Isometric shield or safety net with NI letters, coins dropping into it forming a safety cushion. Protection/insurance visual. Green emerald tones.
Isometric premium/VIP door or gateway with 40% floating above. Professional figure approaching. Mix of warning and opportunity. Purple/violet gradients.
Isometric retirement/pension pot growing with coins being added, government adding matching coins from above. Multiplier effect visual. Purple accents.
Isometric balance scale - one side has salary (coins), other side has benefits (car, bike, pension). Exchange/trade visual. Purple violet tones.
Isometric checklist floating with tick marks, calendar showing April, clock ticking. Urgency but organized feel. Purple with hints of orange warning.
Isometric two figures holding hands with coins/savings flowing between them. Heart shape subtle in background. Warm cyan with pink hints.
Isometric ice block or frozen barrier with pound signs trapped inside. Person's money sliding toward it. Cold blue/cyan with warning elements.
Isometric split scene - Scotland (thistle/tartan hints) on left, England (rose hints) on right. Different height tax stacks on each side. Pink/magenta dividing line.
Isometric fork in the road - one path labeled SALARY (regular coins), other DIVIDENDS (different colored coins). Director figure at decision point. Pink accents.
Isometric mixing bowl or container combining two streams - salary stream and dividend stream - into optimal mix. Director figure overseeing. Amber/gold tones.
Isometric calendar with multiple dates circled/highlighted, alarm bells, urgent stamps. Director desk setup. Orange warning tones.
Isometric building blocks assembling into a small company/office building. Foundation being laid, 'LTD' subtle hint. Cyan construction glow.
Isometric graduation cap with price tag, loan document unfurling showing repayment steps. Student figure. Blue academic tones.
Isometric newspaper or bulletin board with 'NEW' stamps, arrows showing changes (up/down), refresh symbols. Red urgent accents.
Isometric red briefcase (Chancellor's box) opening with documents and pound signs floating out. Autumn leaves subtle. Red/orange government feel.
Isometric crystal ball or forecast screen showing question marks and potential changes. Spring flowers subtle hints. Red with hopeful green accents.
Isometric countdown clock approaching midnight, tax form/document, January calendar page. Urgent but manageable. Orange deadline glow.
Isometric sleek calculator or phone app with numbers displayed, input fields, result showing. Clean tech UI feel. Teal/cyan modern accents.
